name: DVWA
isolation_note: Run DVWA only as a local Docker container on an isolated bridge network (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8080 mapped to a *.lab host). Never point at a public address.
rationale: Single web-app Docker container — Docker-native, low infra, and its vulns (SQLi, command injection, file upload, auth) sit squarely inside the 16-action web abstraction. The right first live closed-loop target before any VulnHub VM.
